Sample export · illustrative structure

SourceA weekly proof bundle

Representative receipt bundle for procurement review · anonymized paths · same schema as live export

Summary

MetricValue
Period2026-06-08 → 2026-06-15 (UTC)
Actions dispatched142
ALLOW118
BLOCK24
Tamper checksPASS (0 mismatches)
Policy versionportfolio-ssot-v3.2

Sample ALLOW receipt

{
  "schema": "governance-dispatch-receipt-v1",
  "verdict": "ALLOW",
  "action": "outreach_send",
  "policy_version": "3.2",
  "scope": "commercial/noetfield-pilot",
  "checksum_sha256": "a3f8…c21d",
  "at": "2026-06-12T14:22:01Z",
  "agent_role": "commercial",
  "founder_approval_ref": "form-pick-Q-NW1-A"
}

Sample BLOCK receipt

{
  "schema": "cross-lane-edit-guard-v1",
  "verdict": "BLOCK",
  "reason": "EDIT ALLOWED missing for cross-desk path",
  "target": "brain-os/law/…",
  "at": "2026-06-11T09:04:12Z",
  "file_touched": false
}

Export contents (typical)

  • index.html — human-readable summary for counsel
  • receipts/ — JSON lines · one row per dispatch
  • boot-proof.json — session gate + factory boot snapshot
  • replay.sh — re-run validators against frozen bundle

Want the live bundle? Book 15 minutes — we screen-share ALLOW, BLOCK, and tamper-FAIL from disk on your stack.

hello@sourcea.com · >Verification · System status

Sample only — not a certification · maps to /sourcea/loops/proof-export.html weekly export path
